page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time 01
text:
is a full color artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 08 July 2022. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000109/
